CIVIL AVIATION
(TERMINAL CHARGES FOR NAVIGATION SERVICES) [ L.S.333.02

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 333.02
CIVIL AVIATION (TERMINAL CHARGES FOR
NAVIGATION SERVICES) REGULATIONS*
1 ta’ Jannar, 2015
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 348 tal-2015, kif emendat bl-Avviż Legali 41 tal-2017,
255 tal-2017,124 tal-2018, 26 tal-2019 u 38 tal-2020, 8 tal-2021, 32 tal2022 u 7 tal-2023 u bl-Att XL tal-2023.

*Dawn ir-regolamenti ġew ippubblikat bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.
